decisions.rationale: The observation resolves to its own base_record_id corridor_first-second-avenues-brt, which is the correct canonical record: both describe the First Avenue/Second Avenue corridor in Manhattan from South Ferry to 125th Street (8.5 miles), served by M15 SBS. The registry record already lists 20100607_1st2nd_cb6_slides as a source and includes the same block evidence refs. No different registry record is a closer or better match.

evidence_refs.source_quote: Service begins October 2010 8.5 miles from South Ferry to 125 th Street

The map illustrates the First Avenue/Second Avenue bus route in Manhattan. The route is marked with a thick black line and white dots representing stops. Key stops include South Ferry, Wall St, Fulton St, Oliver St, Grand St, Houston St, 14 St/1 Av, 23 St/1 Av, 28 St/1 Av, 34 St/1 Av, 42 St/1 Av, 50 St/1 Av, 57 St/1 Av, 67 St/1 Av, 79 St/1 Av, 86 St/1 Av, 96 St/1 Av, 106 St/1 Av, 116 St/1 Av, and 125 St/1 Av.
